responsibilities: • train l earners in accounting principles and real -world accounting practices   • teach accounting software (tally, erp, excel, cloud accounting tools)   • provide hands -on gst, tds, payroll, and compliance training   • develop practical case studies and exercises   • conduct work shops, corporate training, and certification programs   • assess trainee performance and provide feedback
qualifications: • ca / cma / experienced accounting professional   • strong practical accounting and software knowledge   • training and mentoring ability
